01-basic-progress.title: File Upload
01-basic-progress.description: Simulated upload progress with a label and live percentage — starts on button click.

02-storage-quota.title: Storage Quota
02-storage-quota.description: Fixed progress bar showing disk usage relative to a custom max value.

03-onboarding-steps.title: Onboarding Steps
03-onboarding-steps.description: Step tracker using value/max to represent wizard completion.

04-indeterminate.title: Indeterminate Loading
04-indeterminate.description: Animated bar for unknown-duration operations — switches to complete when done.

05-skill-levels.title: Skill Levels
05-skill-levels.description: Stacked progress bars in a profile or stats context with labels and values.
